## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build --configuration Debug`
- [ ] `dotnet test tests/Graph.Model.Analyzers.Tests --configuration Debug`
- [ ] `dotnet test --configuration Debug` (requires Neo4j)

## Checklist

- [ ] Related issues are linked with repeated closing keywords when applicable, e.g. `Closes #64, closes #65`.
- [ ] Public API changes include XML documentation and relevant docs updates.
- [ ] Follow-up work is filed as issues instead of expanding this PR's scope.
